'''S'lixike''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] who served as the commander of the [[32nd Cruiser Squadron]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Captain S'lixike was part of the briefing to determine the New Republic's [[Project Second Chance|response]] to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] attempt to [[Battle of Kalinda|seize]] the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]].<ref name="DS" />

==Appearances==
